1.  Listing Compliance  
National Stock Exchange of India Limited

Scrip Code: GAIL-EQ 
2.  Listing Compliance

Floor 1, Phiroze Jeejeebhoy 
Towers, Dalal Street 
Mumbai – 400001 
      Scrip Code: 532155 
 
 
Sub.: Link of Transcripts of Earnings Conference Call held for discussing 
Unaudited Financial Results for the quarter and half year ended 30.09.2023 
 
Dear Sir/ Madam,  
 
This is in continuation to our letter of even no. ND/GAIL/SECTT/2023 dated        
31st October, 2023.  
 
Please find below the link of Transcripts of Earnings Conference Call held on Tuesday, 
31st October, 2023. 
 
https://www.gailonline.com/pdf/InvestorsZone/GAILQ2FY24EarningCall.pdf 
 
This is in compliance of Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure 
Requirements) Regulations, 2015.  
 
Thanking you, 
Yours faithfully, 
 
 
 
 
 
(Mahesh Kumar Agarwal) 
Company Secretary
